headline: 2 closed trades · exit efficiency None% of in-trade peak · avg post-exit leak 1.21%
reconciliation_note: This panel's 'exit efficiency' answers a DIFFERENT question from the Edge Capture KPI: efficiency = how much of each trade's in-trade peak we kept; the KPI = how much of the total available market move we captured. They are not meant to match. The old -35% 'avg capture' was a distorted per-trade average (losers produce negative ratios) — it was the bug, now retired.
note: Leak = how much the name kept running after we sold. High leak = exiting too early.
